segments.text: Welcome to Lesson 1b — Qwen3 Fundamentals. In this lesson we go deep into how a language model lives on disk and loads into memory, byte by byte.
This lesson builds directly on Lesson 1. If you haven't gone through HuggingFace Beyond Upload yet, start there first.
Our goal today: understand exactly how a 600-million-parameter language model is stored in a file, loaded into RAM, and wired up for inference.
We'll be working with the qwen3.c codebase — a minimal, from-scratch Qwen3 inference engine in pure C.
No prior knowledge of C, memory mapping, or model file formats is required. We'll build the understanding from the ground up.
Transcript and video for this lesson are still being produced. The full written lesson is available on this page.
